name: All-in-One Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Shredded chedar cheese (equal to 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
Frozen Peas & Carrots should be thawed. Egg Noodles should be cooked and drained.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, blend golden onion soup mix with milk; stir in peas & carrots, cooked noodles and tuna. Pour into greased 2-quart oblong baking dish, then top with cheese. Bake 20 minutes or until bubbling.
